ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Gene identifier related to the dataset */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Group identifier for categorizing genes */,
  "n_value" REAL /* N value representing a metric in the dataset */,
  "a_value" REAL /* A value representing another metric in the dataset */,
  "fc_value" REAL /* Fold change value indicating the change in expression */,
  "log10_exp" REAL /* Log10 of expression value */,
  "log10_IGAP" REAL /* Log10 of IGAP value */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded dataset file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Official name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene's function */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group's significance */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, admin, etc.) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Specific action taken during the access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical test) */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of results from the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dataset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., experiment, public database) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset these statistics correspond to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value calculated from the dataset */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of values in the dataset */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value from the dataset */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value in the dataset */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value in the dataset */,
  "quartiles" TEXT /* Quartiles of the dataset (Q1, Q2, Q3) */,
  "outliers" TEXT /* Outliers in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
